title.zh: 大型企业跨语言微服务链路追踪技术调研方案

summary.en: A research-oriented walkthrough of cross-language tracing design choices, interoperability concerns, and rollout considerations for large enterprises.
summary.zh: 对 OpenTelemetry、Tempo、Jaeger、SkyWalking 与 Zipkin 进行平台化对比，给出大型企业链路追踪底座的推荐架构与落地路径。

readingDirection.en: Read this when comparing tracing architectures or planning a platform-wide tracing rollout.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在选型企业级 Trace 平台、设计统一采集链路或规划可观测底座升级时优先阅读。
